subtasks.description: Create a manifest.json file at the project root with all required PWA fields: name ('My Todo List'), short_name, start_url ('./'), display ('standalone'), theme_color, background_color, and an icons array referencing 192×192 and 512×512 PNG/SVG icon files. No external URLs.

Create two SVG icon files (icon-192.svg and icon-512.svg) representing the app logo — a simple checklist/checkmark motif using the app's blue (#4a90e2) brand color. Reference both in manifest.json with the correct size and type fields. These must be self-contained with no external resources.

Create sw.js that on install caches the app shell: index.html, manifest.json, icon-192.svg, icon-512.svg. On fetch, serve from cache first and fall back to network. Use a versioned cache name (e.g. 'todo-v1') and clean up old caches on activate. Must not request any external URLs — all cached URLs are same-origin only.

In the <head> of index.html: add <link rel='manifest' href='manifest.json'>, <meta name='theme-color' content='#4a90e2'>, <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-capable' content='yes'>, <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style'>, and <link rel='apple-touch-icon' href='icon-192.svg'>. At the end of <body>, add an inline <script> block that registers sw.js via navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js') guarded by feature detection.
Run AI review and prepare human handoff

validations: manifest.json contains all required fields: name ('My Todo List'), short_name, start_url ('./'), display ('standalone'), theme_color (#4a90e2), background_color, and icons array referencing both SVG icon files
icon-192.svg and icon-512.svg are self-contained SVGs using #4a90e2 brand color with a checklist/checkmark motif — no external resources

sw.js uses versioned cache name 'todo-v1', caches all four app shell files on install, serves cache-first with network fallback, cleans up old caches on activate, and restricts fetch handling to same-origin requests only
index.html <head> includes <link rel='manifest'>, theme-color meta, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style, and apple-touch-icon link
Service worker registration script is placed at end of <body> with proper 'serviceWorker' in navigator feature detection guard
Privacy guarantee preserved: no external URLs in manifest, SW, or icons — fully self-contained
